detection_method: Check for OpenAPI Swagger Postman collection package.json proxy config
frontend_approach: Connect to real API immediately TanStack Query or SWR
real_time_approach: WebSocket STOMP SSE or polling via TanStack Query refetchInterval
chart_integration: Use real API data with Recharts ApexCharts MUI X-Charts bind to query data
notes: Preferred path always use real data when backend available

detection_method: Check network tab for existing endpoints inspect backend routes package.json proxy
frontend_approach: Explore existing endpoints first document as you go reverse engineer
mock_strategy: MSW with discovered endpoints until backend stabilized
real_time_approach: TanStack Query with polling fallback to WebSocket when available
chart_integration: Fetch data via discovered endpoints normalize for charts
notes: Document API contract incrementally share with backend team

detection_method: Check for backend repo branch status CI/CD pipeline health staging environment
frontend_approach: MSW or json-server with agreed contract use TanStack Query
mock_strategy: MSW browser + server worker with shared mock contract between frontend backend
real_time_approach: TanStack Query with short polling simulate real-time with MSW delay
chart_integration: MSW mock data structured for charts same shape as real API will be
notes: Align mock contract with backend team ensure schema match

detection_method: Check for backend repo absence no API docs no proxy config
frontend_approach: json-server or localStorage mock with TanStack Query
mock_strategy: json-server for REST or localStorage for simple persistence
real_time_approach: Simulated polling with setInterval json-server watch mode
chart_integration: json-server db.json with chart data structure easy to swap to real API
notes: Build as if real API exists use json-server as contract prototype

detection_method: Check API health endpoint error rates response times
frontend_approach: Implement retry logic circuit breaker fallback UI use TanStack Query
mock_strategy: MSW fallback mode when backend down graceful degradation
real_time_approach: TanStack Query with exponential backoff retry stale-while-revalidate
chart_integration: Show cached data with stale indicator fallback to last known good data
notes: Resilience first never block UI on backend failure

scenario: Backend exists but no real-time support
detection_method: Check for WebSocket SSE gRPC streaming endpoints
frontend_approach: Long polling via TanStack Query refetchInterval optimistic updates
mock_strategy: MSW with polling simulation for development
real_time_approach: TanStack Query refetchInterval 5-30s based on data criticality
chart_integration: Update charts on each poll use transition animations for smooth updates
notes: Evaluate if real-time is truly needed or polling is sufficient

detection_method: Check for WebSocket STOMP Socket.io SSE endpoints
frontend_approach: Connect to real-time channel immediately use Zustand or TanStack Query for sync
mock_strategy: MSW with Socket.io mock for development only
real_time_approach: Native WebSocket Socket.io STOMP SSE based on backend stack
chart_integration: Recharts ApexCharts with live data streams real-time update animations
notes: Best case scenario full real-time dashboard experience

detection_method: Check for GraphQL endpoint playground schema
frontend_approach: Apollo Client or TanStack Query with graphql-request fragment colocation
mock_strategy: MSW with GraphQL request handler for development
real_time_approach: TanStack Query with polling or GraphQL subscriptions when available
chart_integration: Chart data from single GraphQL query with nested fragments colocated
notes: Use fragments for chart data shapes colocate with chart components

detection_method: Check API gateway service mesh BFF pattern multiple OpenAPI specs
frontend_approach: API aggregation layer BFF TanStack Query with multiple query sources
mock_strategy: MSW with multiple request handlers for each service
real_time_approach: Independent polling per service or unified WebSocket gateway
chart_integration: Aggregate data from multiple services into unified chart datasets
notes: Use BFF pattern to simplify frontend avoid N+1 queries from UI

detection_method: Check for external API keys rate limits documentation CORS policy
frontend_approach: TanStack Query with external API endpoint proxy through backend if CORS issue
mock_strategy: MSW with third-party response shape for development caching strategy
real_time_approach: TanStack Query with refetchInterval respect rate limits cache aggressively
chart_integration: Normalize third-party data to internal chart schema adapter pattern
notes: Always proxy third-party APIs through backend never expose keys in frontend
